name: ENTERGY ARKANSAS, LLC
summary: Entergy Arkansas, LLC (EAI) is a subsidiary of Entergy Corporation operating within the Entergy system of companies. The filing excerpt pertains to the Cash Balance Equalization Plan of Entergy Corporation and Subsidiaries, an unfunded nonqualified benefit plan providing retirement benefits to eligible non-bargaining management employees that exceed IRS limits under the qualified Cash Balance Plan for Non-Bargaining Employees.
